title: Scout Result Panel (radar chart, alternatives, feedback buttons)
description: Build the in-page Scout Result panel injected into Amazon product pages via Shadow DOM. Components: (1) radar/spider chart visualising True Value dimensions (P1.7); (2) Personal Fit score gauge (P1.8); (3) alternative product suggestions (top 3 by combined score); (4) feedback buttons: 'Not Interested', 'Saved', 'Purchased' — each sends UPDATE_GENOME to background. Panel mounted via createRoot in Shadow DOM (React 19 stable API). Coverage floor rises to 70% in this PR. TDD for panel rendering and feedback dispatch.
